meta.title: Sectors
meta.description: Millwork engineered for every commercial market — eight core markets, one accountable manufacturer.

hero.title: Millwork engineered for every commercial market.
hero.description: Eight core markets. One accountable manufacturer. Every package engineered to the codes, cleanability and life-cycle demands of its industry — and delivered on the schedule that industry runs on.

vs.label: Markets vs. Services
vs.whoBody: This page details every market we serve — healthcare, education, commercial, hospitality, retail, residential, public and specialty. Each with its own codes, standards and delivery model.
vs.whatBodyBefore: For a breakdown of our capabilities — pre-construction, engineering, manufacturing, finishing, PM, logistics, installation and warranty — see the

indexCta.title: Send us your drawings. We'll return a line-item quote in one business day.

market.subSectorsBody: Each capability statement is engineered specifically for its industry — with its own scope, product library, standards, install approach and photography. Nothing is shared between sub-sectors.
market.relatedTitle: Read the deep sector pages within {{market}}.
market.otherTitle: Explore more of what we serve.

cta.title: Have drawings for a {{market}} package?
cta.description: Send us the set and finish schedule — we'll return a line-item quote within one business day.

carousel.label: Project gallery
carousel.title: Work from our {{market}} projects.
carousel.body: Selected portfolio projects from this market — open any slide for the full case study and gallery.
carousel.emptyBody: No featured {{market}} projects in the portfolio yet. Browse the full portfolio for related millwork work.
carousel.emptyExpanding: We're expanding the featured {{market}} gallery. In the meantime, explore completed work across all markets in the portfolio.

detail.whyTitle: The reasons GCs, architects and owners award us the package.
detail.otherTitle: Explore more of what we serve.

healthcare.label: Market
healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.description: Hospital-grade millwork for every clinical, care and wellness environment.

education.label: Market
education.title: Education
education.description: K-12, post-secondary and lifelong-learning millwork built for a 20+ year life-cycle.

commercial.label: Market
commercial.title: Commercial & Workplace
commercial.description: Corporate, civic and financial fit-outs — reception through boardroom.

hospitality.label: Market
hospitality.title: Hospitality & Food Service
hospitality.description: Hotels, restaurants, QSR and entertainment venues — turnkey FOH and BOH millwork.

retail.label: Market
retail.title: Retail & Consumer
retail.description: Brand-consistent fixtures and store build-outs for national and multi-site rollouts.

residential.label: Market
residential.title: Residential
residential.description: High-rise condo, rental and purpose-built rental — lobbies, amenity floors and every unit.

public.label: Market
public.title: Public & Community
public.description: Community centres, libraries, museums and religious buildings — civic-grade millwork.

specialty.label: Market
specialty.title: Specialty Projects
specialty.description: Custom architectural millwork, industrial, transit and one-of-a-kind builds.

healthcare.overview: From acute-care hospitals to long-term care and senior wellness communities, we deliver infection-control-ready millwork engineered for the codes, cleanability and life-cycle demands of healthcare.
overviewBullets: IPAC / ICRA-aware manufacturing and install for live patient environments.
Disinfect-safe finishes tested against hospital chemistry.
Whole-facility scope: public wood, clinical HPL, solid-surface and BOH stainless.

hospitals.name: Hospitals
hospitals.description: Acute-care millwork engineered for infection control, chemical wipe-down and live-site install. Delivered on live hospital sites across Ontario and the northeastern United States.

medical-clinics.name: Medical Clinics
medical-clinics.description: Walk-in, family-health-team, dental and specialty-clinic millwork — clean, warm, cleanable. Family-health teams, private practices and multi-location dental groups.

laboratories.name: Laboratories
laboratories.description: Chemical-resistant lab casework, workstations and research fit-outs for wet, dry and analytical labs. Wet-lab, dry-lab and analytical fit-outs for hospital, university and private research clients.

long-term-care.name: Long-Term Care
long-term-care.description: Resident-scale millwork — warm finishes, accessible fixtures, and daily-cleanable durability. Ministry-of-Health LTC redevelopments and private-operator new builds across Ontario.

senior-living.name: Senior Living
senior-living.description: Independent-living and premium retirement-community millwork — residential warmth, hospitality craft. Branded retirement chains and independent-operator premium communities.

retirement-communities.name: Retirement Communities
retirement-communities.description: Full-campus millwork packages for multi-building retirement communities. Master-planned retirement campuses across Canada.

assisted-living.name: Assisted Living
assisted-living.description: Assisted-living millwork — accessible, warm and quietly clinical. Assisted-living residences and continuing-care communities.

education.overview: Approved on Ontario school-board and college vendor lists — we deliver classroom, lab, library and learning-space millwork sized for the summer construction window.
overviewBullets: School-board and post-secondary vendor-approved.
Summer-window phased delivery and swing-space install.
Grade 1 hardware, impact-rated edges, cleanable finishes.

schools.name: Schools
schools.description: K-12 casework built for a 20-year classroom lifecycle and an 8-week summer window. Ontario public school boards and Massachusetts K-12 builds.

colleges.name: Colleges
colleges.description: Applied-learning millwork — trades bays, teaching kitchens, health-sim and classrooms. Recent work at Niagara College (Marotta Family Innovation Complex).

universities.name: Universities
universities.description: Research-grade university millwork — labs, libraries, studios and admin fit-outs. Recent work at the University of Toronto Robarts Library Study Commons.

libraries.name: Libraries
libraries.description: Public, academic and specialty library millwork — circulation, stacks, study, story-time. Recent work at Valley Park Library, Hamilton and U of T Robarts Library.

daycares.name: Daycares
daycares.description: Child-safe daycare millwork — soft-close, captive hardware, cleanable finishes. Municipal and independent licensed daycare operators.

learning-centres.name: Learning Centres
learning-centres.description: Tutoring, after-school and enrichment-centre millwork — flexible, brand-consistent, kid-safe. Multi-location learning-centre franchises.

training-facilities.name: Training Facilities
training-facilities.description: Corporate and trades training millwork — classrooms, sim-labs and hands-on bays. Corporate, union and government training facilities.

commercial.overview: Head-office, tenant-improvement and institutional workplace packages — feature walls, boardrooms, executive suites and civic service counters, coordinated with the designer, AV and security integrators.
overviewBullets: Design-assist from schematic through construction documents.
Live-tenant / after-hours install for occupied floors.
AV, IT and security-integrator coordination on the shop drawings.

corporate-offices.name: Corporate Offices
corporate-offices.description: HQ, tower and tenant-improvement millwork — reception, boardroom, executive suites. Corporate HQ, tower fit-outs and multi-tenant TI projects.

commercial-interiors.name: Commercial Interiors
commercial-interiors.description: Multi-tenant TI and workplace millwork for downtown and suburban commercial buildings.

financial-institutions.name: Financial Institutions
financial-institutions.description: Bank branches, credit unions and private-banking suites — brand-standard, secure, repeatable.

government-offices.name: Government Offices
government-offices.description: Municipal, provincial and federal office fit-outs — long-life, compliance-driven.

civic-buildings.name: Civic Buildings
civic-buildings.description: City halls, service centres and civic-landmark millwork — 30-year public-realm durability.

professional-offices.name: Professional Offices
professional-offices.description: Law-firm, accounting and consulting-office millwork — refined, quiet, client-facing.

hospitality.overview: Whole-property packages from lobby to back-of-house — sequence-matched veneer walls, guest-room casework, bars, banquettes, feature ceilings and service stations, delivered on hospitality PIP standards.
overviewBullets: AWMAC Premium finish on public-facing veneer.
One PM: millwork + stainless + service counters + banquettes.
Fast prototype-to-rollout for multi-location chains.

hotels.name: Hotels
hotels.description: Whole-hotel millwork — lobby, guest rooms, F&B and BOH under one PM. International hotel-chain and boutique-hotel packages.

resorts.name: Resorts
resorts.description: Destination-resort millwork — hospitality craft with weather-graded outdoor detail. Destination ski, lake and beachfront resort projects.

restaurants.name: Restaurants
restaurants.description: Full-service restaurant millwork — bars, banquettes, hosts, feature ceilings, BOH prep. Recent work: Mercato Mississauga, Scooped by Demetres, Coffee Island Toronto.

quick-service-restaurants.name: Quick Service Restaurants (QSR)
quick-service-restaurants.description: Brand-standard QSR fixture packages — front counters, digital menus, BOH kitting. National QSR chain rollouts.

cafes.name: Cafés
cafes.description: Espresso-bar and specialty-café millwork — pastry cases, coffee bars, retail merchandising.

bars.name: Bars
bars.description: Cocktail-bar, sports-bar and hotel-lounge millwork — the room's centre of gravity.

entertainment-venues.name: Entertainment Venues
entertainment-venues.description: Theatre-lobby, cinema, concert-venue and arcade millwork — durable, dramatic, brand-forward.

retail.overview: From flagship stores to national rollouts — wall systems, cash wraps, display casework and specialty fixtures reproduced store-to-store on the brand PIP, palletized and QR-coded per location.
overviewBullets: CNC and finishing floor scaled for identical-fixture repeatability.
Prototype-to-rollout with tolerance sheets and manifest.
Cross-border logistics (CUSMA) to US locations.

retail-stores.name: Retail Stores
retail-stores.description: Flagship and national-rollout store millwork — cash wraps, wall systems, feature displays. Recent work: Scooped by Demetres, AM Hair & Beauty.

shopping-centres.name: Shopping Centres
shopping-centres.description: Mall common-area, guest-services and food-court millwork. Enclosed-mall and lifestyle-centre common-area programs.

luxury-retail.name: Luxury Retail
luxury-retail.description: Watch, jewellery and luxury-goods casework — museum-grade craft.

showrooms.name: Showrooms
showrooms.description: Auto, appliance and home-goods showroom millwork — display-driven, brand-forward.

pharmacies.name: Pharmacies
pharmacies.description: Retail-pharmacy millwork — dispensing, consultation, front-store retail.

grocery.name: Grocery
grocery.description: Full-format and specialty-grocery millwork — service counters, back-of-house, brand feature walls.

convenience-stores.name: Convenience Stores
convenience-stores.description: C-store fixture packages — front counters, coffee bars, cooler surrounds, fuel-forecourt kiosks.

residential.overview: Whole-building millwork for multi-residential — main-floor lobbies, amenity floors and every in-suite kitchen, vanity and closet. One accountable manufacturer from public spaces to penthouse.
overviewBullets: Public amenity + corridor + every unit under one supplier.
Purchaser-upgrade portals for quartz, cabinetry and closets.
Unit-count manufacturing on developer turnover schedules.

multi-residential.name: Multi-Residential
multi-residential.description: High-rise millwork — lobbies, amenity floors and every unit under one manufacturer.

apartments.name: Apartments
apartments.description: Purpose-built rental millwork — in-suite scope repeated at unit count.

condominiums.name: Condominiums
condominiums.description: Condo tower millwork — public amenities and every in-suite kitchen, vanity and closet.

student-housing.name: Student Housing
student-housing.description: Purpose-built student accommodation millwork — in-suite and shared-amenity.

luxury-residential-common-areas.name: Luxury Residential Common Areas
luxury-residential-common-areas.description: Ultra-luxury tower lobbies, amenity floors and resident-lounge millwork.

public.overview: Durable millwork for civic and community landmarks — rec centres, YMCAs, libraries, museums, cultural centres and places of worship, delivered under municipal procurement compliance.
overviewBullets: Wet-rated construction for aquatic and change-room environments.
MERX / municipal tender-ready with CCDC contracts and bonding.
Heritage-sensitive integration for landmark buildings.

community-centres.name: Community Centres
community-centres.description: Multi-generational community-centre millwork — reception, program rooms, wet spaces.

ymca.name: YMCA
ymca.description: YMCA and Y-family facility millwork — welcome desks, program rooms, wet spaces.

recreation-centres.name: Recreation Centres
recreation-centres.description: Municipal-recreation millwork — arenas, fitness centres, aquatic complexes.

public-libraries.name: Libraries
public-libraries.description: Branch and central-library millwork — circulation, community programming, maker-spaces.

museums.name: Museums
museums.description: Museum-grade millwork — exhibit casework, artefact storage, reception and café.

cultural-centres.name: Cultural Centres
cultural-centres.description: Community cultural, arts and multi-faith centre millwork.

religious-buildings.name: Religious Buildings
religious-buildings.description: Church, mosque, temple and synagogue millwork — sanctuary, gathering, ceremonial detail.

specialty.overview: For projects that don't fit a category — custom architectural millwork, manufacturing plants, transit hubs, airport concessions and specialty fabrication.
overviewBullets: Heavy-duty spec: chemical-resistant laminate, phenolic tops, stainless.
Turnaround install coordinated around production windows.
CGP-eligible for federal secure-scope work.

custom-architectural-millwork.name: Custom Architectural Millwork
custom-architectural-millwork.description: Bespoke architectural detail — feature walls, ceilings, staircases, one-off scope.

manufacturing-facilities.name: Manufacturing Facilities
manufacturing-facilities.description: Industrial-manufacturing millwork — office fronts, break-rooms, QA labs, training rooms.

airports.name: Airports
airports.description: Airport-concession, gate-agent and terminal millwork — 24/7 durability under public traffic.

transit.name: Transit
transit.description: Transit-hub, station and terminal millwork — public-transit-grade durability.

special-projects.name: Special Projects
special-projects.description: One-of-a-kind millwork — anything that doesn't fit a category.
